mapper.insert: insert into subscription_plan_history ( subscription_plan_history_id, company_id, subscription_id, old_plan_id, new_plan_id, billing_cycle, changed_by, changed_at, effective_from, effective_to, created_at ) values ( #{subscriptionPlanHistoryId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{companyId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{subscriptionId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{oldPlanId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{newPlanId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{billingCycle,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{changedBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{changedAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{effectiveFrom,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{effectiveTo,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createdAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} )
mapper.select:
select subscription_plan_history_id, company_id, subscription_id, old_plan_id, new_plan_id, billing_cycle, changed_by, changed_at, effective_from, effective_to, created_at from subscription_plan_history
order by changed_at desc, created_at desc limit #{limit} offset #{offset}

select subscription_plan_history_id, company_id, subscription_id, old_plan_id, new_plan_id, billing_cycle, changed_by, changed_at, effective_from, effective_to, created_at from subscription_plan_history
order by coalesce(effective_from, changed_at) asc, created_at asc limit #{limit} offset #{offset}
